creator: nico-freebsd@schottelius.org
text:
Using the ACL default feature, I recieve the error

setfacl: acl_calc_mask() failed: Invalid argument.

For a full view about what I did have a look at

http://home.schottelius.org/~nico/freebsd/acl.test

I'll update this file, if I got newer information, if I did something wrong.

How-To-Repeat: setfacl -d -m u:chdscni9:rwx /test/
# replace chdscni9 with a valid username
